candidates.title: Google I/O 2026 Keynote: Gemini Omni, AI Smart Glasses, and AI Agents in Search
candidates.keyData: Gemini Omni: video/image generation and editing; Android XR smart glasses (Samsung/Gentle Monster/Warby Parker, launching fall 2026); Project Aura advanced AR glasses; Google Pics image tool; Universal Cart AI shopping; Search AI agents; Google Stitch (100M+ UI screens generated); Gemini Spark proactive features; Gemini for Science; Googlebook laptops
candidates.angle: Google I/O 2026 was the company's most AI-dense keynote in a decade—从视频生成(Gemini Omni)到智能眼镜到AI购物车,Google正在AI全栈布局上全面加速,值得系统盘点

candidates.title: Meta Begins 8,000 Layoffs Today as Zuckerberg Doubles Down on AI Pivot
candidates.keyData: May 20 first wave: 8,000 employees (10% workforce); total 2026 cuts up to 16,000; 7,000 employees reassigned to AI groups; $135B annual AI capex; follows 21,000 layoffs in 2022-23 'year of efficiency'
candidates.angle: Meta裁员第一天：这是2026年最大规模的AI驱动重组事件。分析AI投资与人力成本之间的博弈,以及Zuckerberg的'效率年2.0'与2023年有何不同

candidates.title: Nvidia CEO: China Will Open Its Market to AI Chips From the US
candidates.keyData: Jensen Huang spoke at Dell Technologies World (May 18); days after Trump-Xi summit; Huang: 'over time the market will open'; Nvidia's China market share previously reported near 0% due to export controls
candidates.angle: 黄仁勋在中美芯片博弈中的乐观表态——这是基于外交信号的谨慎乐观,还是纯粹的市场预期管理?结合Nvidia即将发布的财报分析

candidates.title: Analog Devices in Talks to Acquire AI Chip Startup Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 Billion
candidates.keyData: $1.5B all-cash deal; Empower Semiconductor makes voltage-regulating chips for AI processors and data centers; Silicon Valley-based; deal could be announced as soon as Tuesday (May 19-20); surge in data center infrastructure investment for generative AI workloads
candidates.angle: AI芯片并购热潮延续:电源管理芯片成为数据中心基础设施的稀缺资源,Analog Devices的这笔收购反映了AI产业链向上游延伸的趋势

candidates.title: AI Layoffs Create a 'Growing Tribe of Jobless' in Silicon Valley — Cloudflare Cuts 1,000+ Workers, Cites AI
candidates.keyData: Cloudflare laid off 1,000+ workers citing AI; Meta 8,000 cuts starting May 20; Microsoft layoffs; Block cut half its staff (4,000+); growing pattern of 'efficiency restructuring' across tech sector driven by AI investment
candidates.angle: 硅谷正在经历AI驱动的结构性失业——从Meta/Cloudflare到Block/Microsoft,这不是周期性问题而是技术替代。可以与本周Meta裁员组合成一篇深度分析
